name: Sumiya Roza
specialty: Clinical Nutrition and Therapeutic Diet Planning
bio: Dedicated Registered Dietitian with a passion for evidence-based nutritional therapy. Sumiya specializes in creating personalized meal plans to manage chronic conditions, improve metabolic health, and support recovery, empowering patients to achieve their long-term wellness goals through balanced, sustainable nutrition.

name: Abir Hasan Arko
bio: Compassionate Psychiatrist dedicated to providing comprehensive mental health care through a patient-centered approach. Abir specializes in diagnosing and treating a wide range of behavioral and mood disorders, utilizing a combination of evidence-based therapy and medication management to restore emotional balance and improve the overall quality of life for his patients.
qualification: MD, FCPS (Psychiatry), Specialist in Cognitive Behavioral Therapy (CBT)
clinic_address: Level 3, Psychiatry and Behavioral Health Center, HelloMed
